changelog.summary: Initial v6 implementation: 7 .py modules + demo + smoke tests + impl-notes. 66 REFERENCE comments across 8 source files. Source pin verified at 98661fe. lint_source_grounding PASS. Smoke tests 9/9 PASS. Outline subsection 4 reframed (no aux-loss in vLLM).

Test suite: 204/204 passed in 2.24s across 9 test files. All 7 traps pinned. Demo §3.1-§3.5 numerics verbatim-pinned. Trap E negative-grep across vllm/distributed/eplb/ verifies no aux-loss code. ep ∈ {1,2,4,8} forward invariance verified. 5 framing tips for writer in test-report.md. E11-E15 appended to knowledge module. Verdict: APPROVED → handoff to writer.
